positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a celestial cityscape viewed from above at dawn. The main subject is a cluster of ornate, floating islands connected by glowing, stylized bridges. The aesthetic is Art Deco mixed with whimsical fantasy. Use clean, thick outlines and solid color blocking (flat vector style) with subtle gradient highlights to suggest depth. The color palette should be soft purples, warm gold, sky blue, and copper accents. Composition should be perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, designed to look excellent as a seamless repeat or a central, striking graphic. Minimalist, high-contrast silhouettes against a gradient sky background. Vector graphic art, print-ready, highly detailed, kawaii fantasy style.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, poor composition, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifact, low resolution, photorealism, 3d render, writing, messy, messy background
